title: Author SessionEncumbranceLens lens-app — operator-visible real-time encumbrance dashboard
description:
Per [[lens-apps-substrate-pattern-2026-05-18]] + [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]] Layer 5. Typed lens-app rendering SessionEncumbranceState as operator-visible diagnostic. Outputs: per-axis encumbrance bars (context-weight / wall-clock / financial / rate-limit); overall EncumbrancePressureLevel badge; remaining-stamina projection ('at current burn rate, session reaches at-ceiling in X minutes'); top-N most-encumbering abilities active in context (TES-style 'heaviest items in your inventory'); substrate-policy-response indicator (what substrate will do at the next pressure threshold). Multiple render formats: terminal-ascii (for CLI), swiftui-view (for substrate apps), markdown (for chat-rendered status). Reads from SessionEncumbranceState; doesn't author new data — pure projection per [[lens-apps-substrate-pattern]] doctrine.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- SessionEncumbranceState (this cohort) — source of truth
- InferenceUsageEvent stream (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0) — for per-axis encumbrance projections
- EncumbrancePressureLevel ordinality (this cohort) — for badge rendering
